title: Sportsbook API Arbitrage Opportunity
description: A sports betting arbitrage opportunity where a guaranteed profit is possible by betting on both sides across different sportsbooks

bookmaker1.description: First sportsbook in the arbitrage pair

bookmaker2.description: Second sportsbook in the arbitrage pair

homeOdds.description: Home team or over odds from bookmaker1 in American format

awayOdds.description: Away team or under odds from bookmaker2 in American format

profit.description: Guaranteed profit percentage (e.g., 2.5 means 2.5% guaranteed return)

impliedProbabilitySum.description: Sum of implied probabilities (must be < 1.0 for true arbitrage)

detectedAt.description: When the arbitrage opportunity was detected
